item.title:
Brockman confirms that Sam was fired for not being consistently candid.
Crazy that @karaswisher blo...
item.description:
Brockman confirms that Sam was fired for not being consistently candid.
Crazy that @karaswisher blocked me for saying that the board fired Sam for not being consistently candid, when that is in fact what happened.
But she did. And continues to do so.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 27 | 🔁 3 | 💬 1 | 👁 982
item.author: @GaryMarcus
